title: How to generate random numbers
task: Get random decimals, whole numbers in a range, or a whole grid of random values.

excel.note: Whole numbers, both bounds inclusive. RAND() for 0-1 decimals; RANDARRAY(5,3) for a grid (365).

libreoffice.note: Identical; RANDARRAY works in 25.8+ per our tests.

explanation: RANDBETWEEN gives whole numbers with both ends included; RAND gives decimals in [0,1) — scale with =RAND()*(max-min)+min. All of these are volatile: they re-roll on every edit or recalculation. To freeze a set of random values, copy the cells and Paste Special → Values only. (Our verification asserts the deterministic part — the bounds — since the values themselves change every run.)
